title: Fire & Steel
description: It aims to add armor and weapons made of Steel to the game
body:
![Hig](https://i.ibb.co/nfbnFv2/Ads-z-1024-x-542-piksel-1.png)

**_It aims to add armor and weapons made of Steel to the game and continues to be developed._**
 
![Hig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55e181b3c70a3949a2998175e47218f43815ccad.png)

 

# İnfo
 If you hammer Coal, Iron Ingot and Gunpowder on a Blacksmith's table, you get Steel powder.
 
![Hig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07020cdafe250616c694b1b5c8f404f5844aaca.png)


 You can heat Steel Powder in the furnace and make Steel Ingot.

![hig2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8060798c6fdb7f03ebe0e2403f1646d6b1f2a45.png)
 



 Created with the help of Mcreator
